.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version constant from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to use a newer, supported version of the wrapper.
Update the default download URL to point to the new Maven Wrapper artifact group (org.apache.maven.wrapper) corresponding to the new version.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Apply consistent whitespace and brace formatting (e.g., spaces around operators, braces on new lines) to align with modern coding standards.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: public static void main( String args[] ) { ... }

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat the Apache License 2.0 header to match the standard multi-line format used in recent Apache projects.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: /* Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more contributor license agreements. ... */

src/test/java/org/acme/GreetingResourceT.general_idea: Add JUnit 5 annotation to disable the test on Windows operating systems.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename the project artifact ID to a shorter, cleaner name.
Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to version 3.14.0 for better Java 21 support.
Upgrade the Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.5.2.
Add SmallRye OpenAPI dependency for API documentation generation.
Add Hibernate ORM with REST Data Panache for simplified data access.
Add Quarkus OpenShift extension for Kubernetes/OpenShift deployment support.
Add SmallRye Health extension for application health monitoring.
Add the formatter-maven-plugin to enforce code formatting standards.
Move the maven-failsafe-plugin configuration out of the native profile to the main build section for consistent integration test execution.
Simplify the native profile by removing redundant plugin configurations and using skipITs property.
Remove the failsafe.useModulePath property which is no longer needed in modern Maven/Java setups.

.gitignore.general_idea: Reorganize .gitignore to group Maven-related ignores at the top and remove redundant or IDE-specific entries.
.gitignore.human_impl: Moved #Maven block to top, removed .idea/ and *.iml entries.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .factorypath to .gitignore to exclude VS Code factory path configuration.
.gitignore.human_impl: Added .factorypath under # Visual Studio Code section.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .env to .gitignore to prevent committing local environment variables.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper distribution and JAR to newer versions compatible with modern build environments.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.human_impl: Changed distributionUrl to apache-maven-3.8.6 and wrapperUrl to maven-wrapper-3.1.1

README.md.general_idea: Update the Quarkus Maven plugin version in the project generation command to match the newer Quarkus release.
Change the project generation instruction to use the RestEASY reactive extension instead of the legacy one.
Correct indentation in the Java code snippet for the hello method.
Update the return statement in the hello method to append ' world' to the greeting.
Add the missing import for GreetingService in the HelloResource code snippet.
Add a new section documenting how to generate JAX-RS resources using Panache.
Document the addition of Hibernate ORM REST Data with Panache, JDBC PostgreSQL, and RESTEasy reactive Jackson dependencies.
Add documentation for creating a Book entity extending PanacheEntity.
README.md.human_impl: public class Book extends PanacheEntity { public String name; public Integer publicationYear; }

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for creating a BookResource interface extending PanacheEntityResource.
README.md.human_impl: public interface BookResource extends PanacheEntityResource<Book, Long> {}

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions for setting up the database with an import.sql script and configuration properties.
README.md.human_impl: INSERT INTO book(id, name, publicationYear) VALUES (1, 'Sapiens' , 2011);

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for configuring the database connection for the production environment.
Add the Docker command to run a PostgreSQL container for local development.
README.md.human_impl: docker run --ulimit memlock=-1:-1 -it --rm=true --name quarkus-database -e POSTGRES_USER=book -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=book -e POSTGRES_DB=quarkus-library -p 5432:5432 postgres:17.4

README.md.general_idea: Update the native executable build command to include the Quarkus CLI alternative.
Simplify the text regarding running native executables in containers.
README.md.human_impl: Or you can run the native executable build in a container.

README.md.general_idea: Add a new section documenting how to deploy the application to an OpenShift cluster.
Add a new section referencing documentation for deploying to a Kubernetes cluster.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Correct the script header comment to remove the outdated '2' from 'Maven2'.
mvnw.human_impl: Maven2 Start Up Batch script -> Maven Start Up Batch script

mvnw.general_idea: Add support for loading system-wide Maven configuration from /usr/local/etc/mavenrc.
Improve Java executable detection to avoid conflicts with shell functions named 'command'.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR from the deprecated Takari version to the official Apache Maven Wrapper.
Ensure partial or failed downloads of the wrapper JAR are removed to prevent corruption.
Pass MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS to the JVM to support debugging configurations.
Reformat JVM system properties for better readability and consistency.
mvnw.human_impl: Split long line with -Dmaven.home and -Dmaven.multiModuleProjectDirectory into separate lines

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to align with modern standards.
Change the Maven Wrapper group ID from io.takari to org.apache.maven.wrapper in download URLs.
Add usebackq to FOR loop to correctly parse properties file with backticks or special characters.
Replace deprecated HOME environment variable with USERPROFILE for locating mavenrc scripts.
Pass command line arguments to pre-execution mavenrc scripts.
Use cmd /C exit to ensure proper exit code propagation in Windows batch scripts.
Remove spaces around == in IF statements to prevent parsing issues with empty variables.
Reformat the Java execution command with line continuations for readability.
Update Apache License URL from http to https.
Rename header comment from Maven2 to Maven.
Fix typo in comment from 'key stroke' to 'keystroke'.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Remove the LANG environment variable as it is no longer required or supported in the new UBI9 base image configuration.
Remove the AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable which is likely deprecated or handled differently in the new container runtime.
Update comments to reflect new debugging environment variables and clarify JAVA_OPTS behavior.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.human_impl: Added comments about JAVA_DEBUG=true and JAVA_DEBUG_PORT

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Move Quarkus-specific JVM options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default tuning provided by the new entrypoint script.
Remove the AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable as it is no longer required or supported in the new container image context.
Remove the explicit LANG environment variable, relying on the base image defaults or the remaining LANGUAGE variable.
Update the Maven build command in comments to use the new Quarkus property name for legacy jar packaging.
Update documentation comments to reflect the new environment variables required for debugging with the JBoss container entrypoint.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.human_impl: Added instructions for JAVA_DEBUG=true and JAVA_DEBUG_PORT=*:5005

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Update the Maven build command in comments to use the standard Quarkus native build flag.
Upgrade the Docker base image from UBI 8 to UBI 9 to align with modern OS support and JDK 21 compatibility.
Add documentation comments explaining the base image version and how to switch to UBI 8 if needed.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.human_impl:
+# The ` registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal:9.5` base image is based on UBI 9.
+# To use UBI 8, switch to `quay.io/ubi8/ubi-minimal:8.10`.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Explicitly set executable permissions on the application binary during the COPY step.
Replace CMD with ENTRYPOINT to ensure the application binary is always executed as the main process.
